title: Nominee Chief Accountant Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: A chief accountant is a required position in many companies to coordinate with authorities, open bank accounts, and approve financial documents.

hero.title: Nominee Chief Accountant Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Chief accountants in Vietnam are mandatory for non-micro-enterprises, handling tax compliance, financial reporting, audits, and liaising with tax authorities. They require advanced qualifications and oversee critical financial responsibilities.

sections.heading: Benefits of Nominee Chief Accountant Services

items.title: Safeguards for Minimizing Legal Risks and Fines
items.desc: Ensure adherence to financial compliance, reduce legal risks

items.title: Valuable Advices from Professional Experts
items.desc: Advice informs decisions, enhances resource management effectively

items.title: Strategic Tax Optimization and Legal Compliance
items.desc: Optimize tax strategies minimizes liabilities, ensures law compliance

items.title: Accurate Reports Aid Informed Decisions
items.desc: Oversee reports aids decisions, reveals financial health accurately

sections.heading: Required Qualifications of a Chief Accountant in Vietnam
items: Training for a Certificate of Chief Accountant
Proficiency in relevant knowledge, skills, and ethics
Compliance with government standards for the accounting unit

body: *Certain individuals, including those judicially banned from accounting roles and close relatives of the legal representative and director of accounting (except in private enterprises), are ineligible.

sections.heading: Nominee Chief Accountant Service with WTP Advisory

items.title: Creating Nominee Chief Accountant Dossier
items.desc: WTP Advisory facilitates Chief Accountant assignment and bank account opening by coordinating with clients, state authorities, and banks, streamlining the process for a seamless experience. We work with your business and State authorities to assign the Chief Accountant, and with the bank for company bank account opening — including any necessary visits, signatures, and gathering of personal information.

items.title: Ongoing Representation
items.desc: WTP Advisory handles document signing, including accounting, financial, and tax reports, as well as Power of Attorney (POA) documentation to authorize and reassign necessary authority and rights efficiently. This covers signing required documents such as accounting reports, financial reports, tax reports, and tax payment declarations, plus signing POA to re-assign authority and rights to the required person.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions on Nominee Chief Accountant Services

items.q: How do I start outsourcing accounting tasks for my business in Vietnam?
items.a: You can fill in the inquiry form below and one of our accounting experts will get back to you as soon as possible. To speed up the process, please also state your company's features and requirements so we can tailor the most suitable solution for you.

items.q: How much does WTP Advisory's accounting outsourcing service cost?
items.a: The cost depends on your business requirements, e.g., the kinds of reports to be prepared and filed, whether you need reports on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis, etc.

items.q: What are the benefits of accounting outsourcing in Vietnam?
items.a: Benefits of accounting outsourcing include cost reduction (with no need to build an internal team), constant compliance (even with Vietnam's changing regulations), and the ability to keep your core business focus (as accounting is not a revenue-generating task).

items.q: Is accounting outsourcing suitable for all businesses?
items.a: Yes, accounting outsourcing is suitable for large, medium and small businesses. At WTP Advisory, we work with a range of businesses to provide the ideal accounting solution for them.
